qr-code-demo/.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDo.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 11+ compatibility.

qr-code-demo/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Change the Maven compiler release property from Java 17 to Java 21.
qr-code-demo/pom.xml.why_exists: The project targets Java 21, so the compiler must be configured to generate bytecode compatible with Java 21; otherwise, it will compile for Java 17.

qr-code-demo/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the release version in the maven-compiler-plugin configuration to 21.
qr-code-demo/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin explicitly targets Java 21, overriding or reinforcing the property setting for correct bytecode generation.

qr-code-demo/src/main/java/org/acme/qr/Q.general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
qr-code-demo/src/main/java/org/acme/qr/Q.before: sb.append(String.format("<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" version=\"1.1\" viewBox=\"0 0 %1$d %1$d\" stroke=\"none\">\n", qr.size + brd * 2));
qr-code-demo/src/main/java/org/acme/qr/Q.after: sb.append("<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" version=\"1.1\" viewBox=\"0 0 %1$d %1$d\" stroke=\"none\">\n".formatted(qr.size + brd * 2));

qr-code-demo/src/main/java/org/acme/qr/Q.general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
